objective: Create a 6-month growth operating plan for a single-location restaurant, decomposed into 90/30/7-day plans with KPIs/OKRs and a 7–14 day experiment backlog.

constraints: Thu–Sat evenings near capacity (avoid over-driving peak demand)
No CRM; primary conversion is phone/WhatsApp

inScope: experiment backlog (7–14 day tests) with kill metrics

expectedOutputs: Experiment backlog (7–14 day tests) with kill metrics
qualityGates: Plan explicitly accounts for capacity constraints (do not flood peak hours)
Every initiative is measurable and testable
Includes at least 5 experiments with kill metrics and decision dates
approvalGates: Client approves revenue goals and KPI targets
Client approves offer architecture (weekday promos vs premium positioning)
